---
name: FEAT — feature work
about: Implementation of an approved design (often follows an RFC)
title: "FEAT: <short summary>"
labels: feat
assignees: ''
---

## Acceptance criteria

Concrete, testable. The PR closes this issue iff every box is checked.

- [ ] ...
- [ ] Tests added covering the new behavior
- [ ] All 230+ tests still pass
- [ ] No coverage regression
- [ ] Doc updates in sync (CLAUDE.md / STRATEGY.md / docs/* as relevant)
- [ ] If feature affects active behavior, ships default-OFF

## Design / approach

Brief description of how. Link the RFC (if any).

## Out of scope

What this FEAT does NOT do (so reviewers don't ask).

## Cross-references
